ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trend */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend first started */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend ended or is expected to end */,
  "trend_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trend */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Primary source of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "woeid" INTEGER /* Where On Earth Identifier for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record entry */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend being recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for the trend */,
  "datetime_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend was recorded in UTC */,
  "trend_position" INTEGER /* Position of the trend in the ranking for that moment */,
  "trend_volume" INTEGER /* Number of mentions or interactions related to the trend */,
  "trend_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis score (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data for this record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_records_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_records_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend being predicted */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend is predicted to peak */,
  "predicted_position" INTEGER /* Predicted position of the trend */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "predicted_volume" INTEGER /* Predicted number of mentions or interactions */,
  "predicted_sentiment" TEXT /* Predicted sentiment score */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend that the notification is about */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the notification (e.g., email, push) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Politics, Environment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_category_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend associated with the category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_category_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES trend_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_category_assignments_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_integrations" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API integration */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the API */,
  "api_url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the API */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the API was last updated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authentication */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for authentication */,
  "rate_limit" INTEGER /* Rate limit for API calls */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Monthly usage limit for the API */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the API integration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API log entry */,
  "api_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the API was accessed */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* HTTP response code from the API call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_usage_logs_api_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_id") REFERENCES api_integrations ("api_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., social media, news) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data sync */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data sync (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_trend_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source associated with the trend */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend associated with the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_trend_associations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_trend_associations_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES trends ("trend_id")
)
